verdicts.expected: Compact magenta anchorage/anchor symbol matching the S-101/OpenCPN anchor family.
verdicts.judge_comments: Batch 8 removed the earlier generic/recreational look and now reads as the correct anchorage anchor form. Scale is larger and cleaner than OpenCPN, but the semantic cue is correct.
verdicts.observed: Magenta anchor with straight shank, crossbar, and angular flukes.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional native-scale tightening only.

verdicts.expected: Boundary of an anchorage area: larger magenta anchor form from S-101/OpenCPN.
verdicts.judge_comments: Recognizable as the ACHARE51 anchorage boundary symbol and close to the OpenCPN/S-101 anchor-family geometry. The Helm rendering is oversized but not semantically wrong.
verdicts.observed: Larger magenta anchor with squared flukes and no forbidden/slash cue.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional size/stroke normalization.

verdicts.expected: Designated anchor berth symbol: compact anchor with central berth ring.
verdicts.judge_comments: The central circle is now placed on the anchor body and the symbol is clearly the berth variant, not a generic anchorage mark.
verdicts.observed: Magenta anchor with a centered circular berth ring.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional compacting to match source scale.

verdicts.expected: Anchor point symbol: simple magenta anchor glyph.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantically correct and close enough to the OpenCPN anchor-point reference in Helm line style.
verdicts.observed: Plain magenta anchor matching the ACH anchor family.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional native-scale tuning.

verdicts.expected: Restricted anchoring symbol with anchor, diagonal slash, and caution marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: The key safety semantics are present: anchoring/restriction plus caution. Marker placement is stylized but close to the OpenCPN reference.
verdicts.observed: Magenta anchor with diagonal prohibition/restriction slash and exclamation caution cue.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional adjust exclamation placement/scale.

verdicts.expected: Restricted anchoring symbol with anchor, diagonal slash, and information marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correctly distinguishes the information variant from ACHRES61. The cue is present and readable.
verdicts.observed: Magenta anchor with diagonal restriction slash and information cue.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional marker placement/scale cleanup.

verdicts.expected: Additional mark triangle pointing right.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantically exact against OpenCPN; only size/stroke differs.
verdicts.observed: Black right-pointing triangular mark.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required.

verdicts.expected: Additional mark triangle pointing left.
verdicts.judge_comments: Direction is correct and matches the OpenCPN cue.
verdicts.observed: Black left-pointing triangular mark.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required.

verdicts.expected: Additional mark board at bottom: small horizontal board.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct board/bar semantics; Helm fill/stroke is heavier but acceptable.
verdicts.observed: Horizontal filled board/bar mark.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional reduce scale.

verdicts.expected: Airport area pattern symbol: aircraft in circle.
verdicts.judge_comments: Clearly matches the S-101/OpenCPN airport glyph family in Helm style.
verdicts.observed: Brown/gold aircraft inside a circle.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional aircraft proportion tuning.

verdicts.expected: AIS target with heading/course unknown: AIS triangle plus question cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correctly preserves the AIS target and question-mark semantics.
verdicts.observed: Green AIS triangle with unknown-heading question mark.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale normalization.

verdicts.expected: One-minute AIS vector mark: small angled/chevron cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Batch 8 fixed the earlier ARPA-like bar. The current chevron reads as the OpenCPN AIS one-minute marker, though it is still larger than the source.
verdicts.observed: Small green chevron/one-minute AIS vector mark.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional shrink to native tick scale.

verdicts.expected: Six-minute AIS vector mark preserving the angled AIS marker form.
verdicts.judge_comments: Now distinguishes the six-minute AIS mark without reverting to a generic horizontal ARPA bar.
verdicts.observed: Green chevron AIS vector mark with additional lower tick.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional source-scale tightening.

verdicts.expected: Sleeping AIS target: hollow AIS triangle.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct target family and orientation-independent semantics.
verdicts.observed: Green hollow AIS triangle.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required.

verdicts.expected: Active AIS vessel target showing vector and/or heading.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantically aligned with the active AIS vessel reference.
verdicts.observed: Green AIS vessel triangle with center dot/cue.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required.

verdicts.expected: ARPA target circle with center dot.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct ARPA target form; style is heavier but recognizable.
verdicts.observed: Green circular ARPA target with center dot.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke pass.

verdicts.expected: One-minute ARPA vector mark: horizontal tick.
verdicts.judge_comments: Matches the OpenCPN cue in shape; only scale/stroke differs.
verdicts.observed: Small green horizontal vector tick.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional shrink to source tick size.

verdicts.expected: Six-minute ARPA vector mark: horizontal ARPA tick from OpenCPN/S-52.
verdicts.judge_comments: Now uses the ARPA horizontal-tick family instead of an AIS chevron. Confidence is lower because the OpenCPN crop is tiny and the Helm candidate is much larger.
verdicts.observed: Longer/thicker green horizontal vector tick.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; recommended source-scale verification before final approval.

verdicts.expected: North cardinal topmark: two cones/triangles point up.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct cardinal orientation and color. Scale/stroke are Helm style only.
verdicts.observed: Two yellow triangles both pointing up.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required.

verdicts.expected: East cardinal topmark: cones/triangles point away from each other.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct east-cardinal orientation and recognizable against S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua.
verdicts.observed: Yellow topmark pair points away from center.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required.

verdicts.expected: South cardinal topmark: two cones/triangles point down.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct south-cardinal orientation; no quadrant hazard.
verdicts.observed: Two yellow triangles both pointing down.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required.

verdicts.expected: West cardinal topmark: cones/triangles point toward each other.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct west-cardinal orientation and recognizable against references.
verdicts.observed: Yellow topmark pair points toward the center.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required.

verdicts.expected: BCNCON81 exact beacon/constructed special-purpose symbol from a verified S-52/OpenCPN reference crop.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate is plausible beacon artwork, but the queue does not provide an inspectable reference image for BCNCON81 in this pass. Under strict rules this cannot pass on plausibility alone.
verdicts.observed: Black vertical beacon/post mark with crossbar and small base circle.
verdicts.required_change: Regenerate or locate the exact BCNCON81 OpenCPN/S-52 reference crop, then compare/redraw against that crop before passing.

verdicts.expected: Default beacon symbol with rectangular body and uncertainty/question cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Matches the OpenCPN default beacon/question cue closely enough for semantic pass.
verdicts.observed: Gray vertical default beacon body with question mark.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke cleanup.

verdicts.expected: General full-chart beacon symbol with compact post, crossbar/base, and circular base cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Batch 8 restored the base circle/crossbar cue that was missing earlier. It remains heavy/large but semantically matches the OpenCPN/S-101 form.
verdicts.observed: Black beacon post with crossbar and base circle.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional compact to source proportions.

verdicts.expected: Paper-chart/default beacon form with circle/base/crossbar and question cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Now preserves the general beacon geometry plus the question cue. Scale remains stylized but acceptable.
verdicts.observed: Black beacon post with crossbar/base circle and question mark.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional compact to source proportions.

verdicts.expected: General white full-chart beacon.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct colored beacon family and shape compared with OpenCPN.
verdicts.observed: White beacon body with black outline and vertical post.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke cleanup.

verdicts.expected: General red full-chart beacon.
verdicts.judge_comments: Color and beacon body semantics match the OpenCPN reference.
verdicts.observed: Red beacon body with black outline and vertical post.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke cleanup.

verdicts.expected: General green full-chart beacon.
verdicts.judge_comments: Color and geometry match the expected beacon reference family.
verdicts.observed: Green beacon body with black outline and vertical post.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke cleanup.

verdicts.expected: General red/white full-chart beacon.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct color split and beacon shape; close to OpenCPN in Helm style.
verdicts.observed: Red-over-white beacon body with black outline and vertical post.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional scale/stroke cleanup.
